creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: yuri
Date: Sat Feb 10 01:11:57 UTC 2018
New revision: 461358
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/461358

Log:
  devel/flexjson: Update to 2.1

  amutu@amutu.com took maintainership.

  Additional port changes:
  * DISTVERSION
  * Update of MASTER_SITES.
  * No need for USES=zip any more.
  * No need for NO_WRKSUBDIR.
  * Minor change in do-install.
  * PORTDOCS to the end.

  PR:		220075
  Submitted by:	Jov <amutu@amutu.com>
  Approved by:	tcberner (mentor, implicit)

Changes:
  head/devel/flexjson/Makefile
  head/devel/flexjson/distinfo
